query: Group users by their sign-up month to track retention
example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_time_cohorts(
    date_column='signup_date',
    time_period='month',
    format_cohorts=True,
    datetime_format='%Y-%m-%d'
)

query: Segment users based on their registration quarter for annual analysis
example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_time_cohorts(
    date_column='registration_date',
    cohort_column='registration_quarter',
    time_period='quarter',
    datetime_format='%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'
)

query: Create weekly cohorts from user first purchase dates
example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_time_cohorts(
    date_column='first_purchase_date',
    time_period='week',
    format_cohorts=True,
    cohort_column='purchase_week_cohort'
)

query: Group customers by their joining year to analyze annual spending patterns
example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_time_cohorts(
    date_column='customer_joined_date',
    time_period='year',
    format_cohorts=False
)

query: Create daily cohorts for detailed analysis of new user onboarding
example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_time_cohorts(
    date_column='signup_timestamp',
    time_period='day',
    format_cohorts=True,
    datetime_format='%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S'
)

query: Create customer segments based on initial subscription plan
Group users by their preferred device type for behavioral analysis
Segment customers by their purchase frequency into high, medium, and low value groups
Create age-based customer cohorts for demographic analysis
example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_behavioral_cohorts(
    behavior_column='age',
    cohort_column='age_group',
    conditions={
        '18-24': 'age >= 18 and age <= 24',
        '25-34': 'age >= 25 and age <= 34',
        '35-44': 'age >= 35 and age <= 44',
        '45-54': 'age >= 45 and age <= 54',
        '55+': 'age >= 55'
    }
)

query: Segment users based on their activity level last month
Calculate 3-month retention rates for each user acquisition channel
example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | calculate_retention(
    cohort_column='acquisition_channel',
    date_column='activity_date',
    user_id_column='user_id',
    time_period='month',
    max_periods=3,
    retention_type='rolling'
)

query: Measure weekly retention for new mobile app users over their first 8 weeks
example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | calculate_retention(
    cohort_column='signup_week',
    date_column='login_date',
    user_id_column='app_user_id',
    time_period='week',
    max_periods=8,
    retention_type='classic'
)

query: Analyze conversion from trial to paid subscription for each pricing tier
example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | calculate_conversion(
    cohort_column='pricing_tier',
    event_column='user_action',
    user_id_column='user_id',
    funnel_steps=['trial_started', 'feature_used', 'paywall_viewed', 'subscription_purchased'],
    step_names=['Trial', 'Feature Usage', 'Paywall', 'Purchase'],
    include_rates=True
)

query: Track funnel conversion from email signup to first order by marketing campaign
example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | calculate_conversion(
    cohort_column='campaign_name',
    event_column='event_type',
    user_id_column='email_id',
    funnel_steps=['email_signup', 'site_visit', 'product_view', 'add_to_cart', 'checkout', 'purchase'],
    include_rates=True,
    cumulative=False
)

query: Track 6-month cumulative revenue for each geographical region
example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | calculate_lifetime_value(
    cohort_column='region',
    date_column='transaction_date',
    user_id_column='customer_id',
    value_column='revenue',
    time_period='month',
    max_periods=6,
    cumulative=True
)
